stemHtml: As the pilot of aircraft G-ABCD operating in the vicinity of Bern airport, you want to request the true bearing from the station. What is the correct phrasing for this transmission?

options.a: G-ABCD, Bern Approach, request true bearing. G-ABCD, I say again, request true bearing.
options.d: True bearing, true bearing, Bern approach, G-ABCD, request true bearing, G-ABCD
